sentences.text: Paul this is Mitch over at rentable. I just sent you an email just was calling to confirm for our call today at eleven AM thanks look forward to speaking soon bye.

Hi, and thank you for calling West cal management. Our offices are currently closed. If this is an after hours emergency please dial nine for assistance, please dial one to leave a message or if you know your party's extension you may dial it now or dial the star key for them you know. No directory entries match your search welcome to the directory please enter the first three letters of your party's first or last name using your new direct. Penny if this is the person you are looking for press one now, otherwise please press Star. Now there are no more compatible entries in the directory welcome to the directory please enter the first three letters of your party's first or last name using your. P a U L space. B O R O S E Y E V if this the person you are looking for press one now. The person at extension three four nine four is unavailable. Please leave your message. After the tone when done hang up or press the pound key.
